description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/rili/docker-ci:ci-latest with a single deploy stage. Define a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, is tagged with deploy and rilis.io, and sets the environment named rilis.io with URL https://rilis.io. In the job script, execute: mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../ -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=~/rilis.io/ -G "Ninja", ninja, rm -rf ~/rilis.io/, ninja install, chmod -R o=rx ~/rilis.io/. Publish the public/ directory as an artifact that expires in 1 day.
